description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate filled with a variety of foods, including grilled meat pieces, a mound of white rice, a portion of flatbread, and a colorful salad with sliced vegetables. The plate is densely packed, with the food items arranged in distinct sections, each maintaining its own space. The grilled meats appear browned and slightly charred, while the rice is fluffy and compact. The flatbread is folded and placed along the edge of the plate, and the salad adds a splash of red and green. The plate itself has a slightly raised rim and a glossy finish, typical of ceramic dinnerware. There are no visible markings or decorative patterns on the plate.
description: A white ceramic plate filled with grilled meats, rice, flatbread, and a colorful salad, all arranged in separate sections. The plate has a glossy finish and a slightly raised rim.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from the front, clearly showing all food items: grilled meats, rice, flatbread, and salad, with the arrangement and colors most visible.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the flatbread and partially obscures the rice and salad, with the meats still visible but less prominent.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the grilled meats and flatbread, with the rice and salad mostly hidden behind the other foods.
description_view_3: This view shows the rice mound most prominently, with the grilled meats and salad visible to the side and the flatbread partially covering the plate's edge.
